name: taac2026-cli
description: Agent-friendly TAAC2026 / Taiji experiment CLI for metrics, logs, config diffs, and safe submits.

scripts.check: node --check bin/taac2026.mjs && node --check scripts/scrape-taiji.mjs && node --check scripts/compare-config-yaml.mjs && node --check scripts/prepare-taiji-submit.mjs && node --check scripts/submit-taiji.mjs && node --check scripts/experiment-tools.mjs
